info.title: PhoAmThuc API
info.description: Auto-generated OpenAPI spec from Express routes.

get.description: Check backend availability and database connectivity.
Get current authenticated user profile.

post.description: Change current user password by verifying old password first.
Create a new account with email and password.
Authenticate user and return auth tokens.
Redeem access code for authenticated user.
Refresh auth session by refresh token.
Create payment transaction for authenticated user.
Revoke current access token from header or request body.
Validate callback signature and finalize payment status.

get.description: Return current content version and sync metadata.
Return full POI and tour data for bootstrap or fallback sync.

post.description: Return delta changes from a client content version.
Upload image file for a POI in the partner namespace.
Upload image file for a tour in the partner namespace.
PARTNER submits a POI create payload for ADMIN review.

put.description: PARTNER submits a POI update payload for ADMIN review.

delete.description: PARTNER submits a POI delete request for ADMIN review.

post.description: PARTNER submits a Tour create payload for ADMIN review.

put.description: PARTNER submits a Tour update payload for ADMIN review.

delete.description: PARTNER submits a Tour delete request for ADMIN review.

get.description: PARTNER lists only approval requests created by the current account.
PARTNER gets detail of an approval request owned by the current account.

post.description: Enqueue server-side TTS jobs for a POI.
Create POI record from CMS payload.

get.description: List POIs including unpublished records for CMS.

post.description: Publish POI and trigger TTS queue.

get.description: Retrieve POI by id for CMS.

post.description: Create tour with ordered POI sequence.

get.description: Retrieve tour by id for CMS.

post.description: PARTNER submits a POI/TOUR create-update-delete request for ADMIN review.

get.description: ADMIN lists approval requests and filters by status/entity/action.
PARTNER lists only approval requests created by the current account.
PARTNER gets detail of an approval request owned by the current account.
ADMIN gets detail of an approval request.

post.description: ADMIN approves a pending request and applies its domain changes atomically.
ADMIN rejects a pending request.
Run dry-run or execute soft-delete retention cleanup.
Force clients to refresh sync metadata.

get.description: Return queue counts and worker status.
Validate runtime TTS configuration.
Retrieve users and optionally filter by role.

post.description: Assign USER/PARTNER/ADMIN role for target user.
Downgrade target user role to USER.

get.description: Get paginated POI list for user subscription.
Get POI detail by id for user subscription.

post.description: Search nearby POIs using latitude, longitude, and radius.

get.description: Get paginated tour list for user subscription.
Get tour detail by id for user subscription.

post.description: Upload analytics events in batch.
Update online and active user windows by heartbeat.

get.description: Get analytics summary metrics.
